creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Renaming php-fpm to php_fpm a nice POLA violation after upgrading a server (or an automatic container image).

It's good that there is a message in UPDATING, but having something in pkg-message would've been nice too.

I wonder if changing the rc framework to treat - and _ the same would be an option (reminds me a bit of pip packages who constantly flip between the two).
